sources.sql: 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_profiles'
"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_profiles WHERE data_source = 'csrd_report'"
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dh_ca100_assessments'
'SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country_iso3) FROM dh_country_risk_indices'
'SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT index_name) FROM dh_country_risk_indices'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM csrd_kpi_values'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM csrd_entity_registry'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolios_pg'

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.sector AS dh_sbti_companies_sector, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS companies, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s) THEN %(param_1)s ELSE %(param_2)s END) AS aligned_1_5c, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true) THEN %(param_3)s ELSE %(param_4)s END) AS net_zero, sum(CASE WHEN (lower(dh_sbti_companies.targ…
'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.target_status AS dh_sbti_companies_target_status, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies GROUP BY dh_sbti_companies.target_status'

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition AS dh_sbti_companies_near_term_ambition, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition'

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.sector AS dh_sbti_companies_sector, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s) THEN %(param_1)s ELSE %(param_2)s END) AS a15, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_2)s) THEN %(param_3)s ELSE %(param_4)s END) AS wb2, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near…

"SELECT c.country_name, c.country_iso3, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'CPI' THEN c.score END) AS cpi, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'FSI' THEN c.score END) AS fsi, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'FH_FIW' THEN c.score END) AS fh_fiw, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'UNDP_GII' THEN c.score END) AS gii FROM dh_country_risk_indices c WHERE c.year = ( SELECT MAX(year) FROM dh_country_risk_indices sub WHERE s…

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.country AS dh_sbti_companies_country, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s) THEN %(param_1)s ELSE %(param_2)s END) AS a15, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true) THEN %(param_3)s ELSE %(param_4)s END) AS nz FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.country IS NOT…

"SELECT sector_cluster, COUNT(*) AS companies, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_1_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS disclosure_yes, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_2_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS targets_yes, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_3_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS emissions_yes, -- Alignment score: count of 'Yes' across first 3 indicators / 3 ROUND(AVG( (CASE WHEN indicator_1_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE…
'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.target_status AS dh_sbti_companies_target_status, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies GROUP BY dh_sbti_companies.target_status'

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition AS dh_sbti_companies_near_term_ambition, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition'

"SELECT sector_cluster, COUNT(*) AS companies, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_1_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS disclosure_yes, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_2_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS targets_yes, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_3_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS emissions_yes, -- Alignment score: count of 'Yes' across first 3 indicators / 3 ROUND(AVG( (CASE WHEN indicator_1_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE…

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.sector AS dh_sbti_companies_sector, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s) THEN %(param_1)s ELSE %(param_2)s END) AS a15, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_2)s) THEN %(param_3)s ELSE %(param_4)s END) AS wb2, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near…

"SELECT c.country_name, c.country_iso3, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'CPI' THEN c.score END) AS cpi, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'FSI' THEN c.score END) AS fsi, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'FH_FIW' THEN c.score END) AS fh_fiw, MAX(CASE WHEN c.index_name = 'UNDP_GII' THEN c.score END) AS gii FROM dh_country_risk_indices c WHERE c.year = ( SELECT MAX(year) FROM dh_country_risk_indices sub WHERE s…
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_profiles'
"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_profiles WHERE data_source = 'csrd_report'"
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true'
'SELECT count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS count_1 FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s'
'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dh_ca100_assessments'

'SELECT dh_sbti_companies.sector AS dh_sbti_companies_sector, count(dh_sbti_companies.id) AS companies, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.near_term_ambition ILIKE %(near_term_ambition_1)s) THEN %(param_1)s ELSE %(param_2)s END) AS aligned_1_5c, sum(CASE WHEN (dh_sbti_companies.net_zero_committed = true) THEN %(param_3)s ELSE %(param_4)s END) AS net_zero, sum(CASE WHEN (lower(dh_sbti_companies.targ…
'SELECT MIN(carbon_price_2050_usd), MAX(carbon_price_2050_usd), AVG(carbon_price_2050_usd) FROM ngfs_scenarios WHERE carbon_price_2050_usd IS NOT NULL'

"SELECT MIN(alignment_rate) AS min_ar, MAX(alignment_rate) AS max_ar, AVG(alignment_rate) AS avg_ar FROM ( SELECT sector, ROUND( (COUNT(CASE WHEN near_term_ambition ILIKE '1.5%%%%' THEN 1 END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN near_term_ambition ILIKE 'Well-below%%%%' THEN 1 END) )::numeric / GREATEST(COUNT(*), 1) * 100, 1 ) AS alignment_rate FROM dh_sbti_companies WHERE sector IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sector HAVING…
"SELECT MIN(score), MAX(score), AVG(score) FROM dh_country_risk_indices WHERE index_name = 'CPI' AND score IS NOT NULL"
"SELECT MIN(score), MAX(score), AVG(score) FROM dh_country_risk_indices WHERE index_name = 'FSI' AND score IS NOT NULL"
"SELECT MIN(score), MAX(score), AVG(score) FROM dh_country_risk_indices WHERE index_name = 'UNDP_GII' AND score IS NOT NULL"

"SELECT MIN(score), MAX(score), AVG(score) FROM dh_country_risk_indices WHERE index_name = 'FH_FIW' AND year = ( SELECT MAX(year) FROM dh_country_risk_indices WHERE index_name = 'FH_FIW' ) AND score IS NOT NULL"
'SELECT ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN net_zero_committed = true THEN 1 END)::numeric / GREATEST(COUNT(*), 1) * 100, 1) AS nz_pct FROM dh_sbti_companies'
"SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_1_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS disc_y, COUNT(CASE WHEN indicator_2_score = 'Yes' THEN 1 END) AS tgt_y FROM dh_ca100_assessments"
'SELECT scenario_name, carbon_price_2030_usd, carbon_price_2050_usd FROM ngfs_scenarios WHERE carbon_price_2030_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY scenario_name'
"SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN LOWER(target_status) = 'targets set' THEN 1 END) AS targets_set FROM dh_sbti_companies"
